property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26.0.1\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\User\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\User\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\User\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE\bin;.

testcase.name: Admin Login with valid credentials - Run 1
testcase.system-out:
Scenario Outline: Admin Login with valid credentials - Run 1 # src/test/resources/features/features/AdminLogin.feature:11
🚀 Browser launched for scenario. 🧹 Cleared localStorage (stale session removed). ✅ Admin login page opened: http://localhost:5173/admin/login ✔ Given Admin opens the admin login page # com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.AdminLoginSteps.admin_opens_the_admin_login_page() ✅ Admin username entered: admin ✔ When admin enters username "admin" # com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.AdminLoginSteps.admin_enters_username(java.lang.String) ✅ Admin password entered. ✔ And admin enters password "admin123" # com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.AdminLoginSteps.admin_enters_password(java.lang.String) ✅ Admin login button clicked. ✅ Redirected to: http://localhost:5173/admin/dashboard 🎉 ADMIN LOGIN SUCCESS — Dashboard reached! ✔ Then admin clicks the login button and reaches dashboard # com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.AdminLoginSteps.admin_clicks_the_login_button_and_reaches_dashboard() 🛑 Browser closed after scenario.
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. Jul 18, 2026 11:02:01 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 150, returning the closest version; found: 149; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 150

testcase.name: Employee Login with valid credentials - Run 1
testcase.system-out:
Scenario Outline: Employee Login with valid credentials - Run 1 # src/test/resources/features/features/EmployeeLogin.feature:11
🚀 Browser launched for scenario. 🧹 Cleared localStorage (stale session removed). ✅ Employee login page opened: http://localhost:5173/employee/login ✔ Given Employee opens the employee login page # com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.EmployeeLoginSteps.employee_opens_the_employee_login_page() ✅ Employee username entered: emp002 ✔ When employee enters username "emp002" # com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.EmployeeLoginSteps.employee_enters_username(java.lang.String) ✅ Employee password entered. ✔ And employee enters password "pass123" # com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.EmployeeLoginSteps.employee_enters_password(java.lang.String) ✅ Employee login button clicked. ✅ Redirected to: http://localhost:5173/employee/dashboard 🎉 EMPLOYEE LOGIN SUCCESS — Dashboard reached! ✔ Then employee clicks the login button and reaches dashboard # com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.EmployeeLoginSteps.employee_clicks_the_login_button_and_reaches_dashboard() 🛑 Browser closed after scenario.
